channel.title: OnThisDay
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from OnThisDay, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Today in History for 27th April 2026
item.description: Historical Events 1296 - Battle of Dunbar: The Scots are defeated by Edward I of England 1877 - Rutherford B. Hayes removes Federal troops from Louisiana, ending Reconstruction 1941 - German troops enter Athens during WWII 2011 - A massive tornado outbreak kills over 350 people across the southern United States 2018 - North Korean leader Kim Jong-un crosses the border to meet South Korean President Moon Jae-in
